case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A. VS. TIM A. DIAS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CHASTIDY SIMON RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-03-2004 CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAS, TIM A. $2,396.58 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $195.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,111.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
